response.title: Lead Marketing Strategist
response.description: We are seeking a dynamic Lead Marketing Strategist to guide our marketing team in developing and executing innovative marketing strategies. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of successful campaign management, a strong analytical mindset, and exceptional leadership skills. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance brand awareness, drive customer acquisition, and increase engagement across digital and traditional channels.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, or related field.
